name: 天津
description: Tianjin, a bustling port city near Beijing, blends European colonial architecture with traditional Chinese culture. Famous for the Ancient Culture Street, food culture featuring Mahua and Goubuli baozi, and the impressive Tianjin Eye Ferris wheel.

climate.tips: Best in spring and autumn. Summers hot and humid. Winters cold and dry. Spring brings sandstorms from Gobi Desert.

attractions.name: 天津之眼
attractions.description: Giant 120-meter Ferris wheel on the Haihe River, offering panoramic city views.
attractions.tips: Book tickets online. Best at sunset or night. Avoid holidays when crowded.

attractions.name: 古文化街
attractions.description: Historic street with traditional architecture, temples, and local crafts.
attractions.tips: Best in morning for atmosphere. Try mahua and tea. Take boat ride on Haihe.

attractions.name: 五大道
attractions.description: Area with colonial European architecture from early 20th century, featuring buildings from various countries.
attractions.tips: Rent a bicycle or take a horse carriage tour. Best in autumn. Many buildings now house cafes.

attractions.name: 天津古文化街
attractions.description: Replica of ancient street with traditional buildings, handicraft shops and food vendors.
attractions.tips: Great for souvenirs. Watch for traditional art demonstrations. Combine with Haihe River walk.

attractions.name: 海河
attractions.description: Central river flowing through Tianjin with historic bridges and riverside parks.
attractions.tips: Take evening boat cruise for best views. Walk across the Friendship Pavilion Bridge.

attractions.name: 石版画狗
attractions.description: Famous for folk art and traditional Tianjing paintings.
attractions.tips: Buy authentic New Year paintings as souvenirs. Watch artists at work.

attractions.name: 天津图书馆
attractions.description: Modern library with impressive architecture and vast collection of books.
attractions.tips: Great for book lovers. The architecture is impressive. Quiet atmosphere.

attractions.name: 水上公园
attractions.description: Large urban park with lakes, pavilions and amusement rides.
attractions.tips: Best in spring for cherry blossoms. Great for families. Boat rentals available.

attractions.name: 天津经济技术开发区
attractions.description: Modern industrial zone with technology companies and entertainment facilities.
attractions.tips: Home to several theme parks. The Ferris wheel area is popular.

attractions.name: 黄崖关长城
attractions.description: Section of the Great Wall with steep climbs and scenic mountain views.
attractions.tips: Less crowded than Beijing sections. Wear hiking shoes. Bring water and snacks.

attractions.name: 盘龙水利风景区
attractions.description: Lake with traditional Chinese gardens and water activities.
attractions.tips: Beautiful at sunset. Less crowded than Water Park. Great for traditional Chinese photos.

attractions.name: 天后宫
attractions.description: Historic temple dedicated to the sea goddess, one of the three famous Tianhou temples in China.
attractions.tips: One of the oldest temples in Tianjin. Visit during festivals for traditional performances.

attractions.name: 蓟县大碱厂
attractions.description: Historic salt refinery showcasing industrial heritage.
attractions.tips: Learn about Tianjin's salt industry history. Combine with nearby mountain trips.

attractions.name: 天津自然博物馆
attractions.description: Modern museum with exhibits on paleontology, dinosaurs and local ecosystems.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Allow 2-3 hours. Combine with nearby cultural attractions.

attractions.name: 天津音乐厅
attractions.description: Elegant colonial-era concert hall hosting classical performances.
attractions.tips: Book tickets in advance for popular performances. Dress appropriately.

attractions.name: 滨海新区
attractions.description: Modern development zone with contemporary architecture and entertainment.
attractions.tips: Explore the modern side of Tianjin. The National Museum of China Seafaring is here.

attractions.name: 天津古楼
attractions.description: Historic drum tower marking the center of old Tianjin.
attractions.tips: Watch the daily drum performances. The surrounding area has traditional shops.

attractions.name: 天津海昌极地海洋世界
attractions.description: Large aquarium with polar animals and marine life shows.
attractions.tips: Full day attraction. Arrive early for shows. Buy tickets online.

attractions.name: 天津劝业场
attractions.description: Historic department store and shopping district.
attractions.tips: Shop like a local. The building is beautiful. Explore nearby streets.

attractions.name: 欢乐谷
attractions.description: Large theme park with roller coasters and family rides.
attractions.tips: Arrive early. Wear comfortable shoes. Bring sunscreen and water.

attractions.name: 天津美术馆
attractions.description: Modern art museum with Chinese and international exhibitions.
attractions.tips: Check schedule for special exhibitions. Great for art enthusiasts.

attractions.name: 天津之眼摩天轮
attractions.description: Spectacular night views of the illuminated Ferris wheel and river.
attractions.tips: Best after dark. Bring tripod for photos. Combine with evening river cruise.

attractions.name: 杨柳青年画馆
attractions.description: Exhibition hall for traditional Chinese New Year paintings.
attractions.tips: Buy authentic paintings as souvenirs. Watch the creation process.

attractions.name: 天津朱成功纪念馆
attractions.description: Memorial hall for Ming Dynasty general Zhu Cheng Gong.
attractions.tips: Learn about local hero. Combine with Huangyaguan Great Wall trip.

attractions.name: 意式风情区
attractions.description: 中国唯一的意大利风情建筑群，保存了100余栋意式建筑，梁启超等名人故居在此。
attractions.tips: 傍晚最有氛围，适合拍照。

attractions.name: 五大道
attractions.description: 中国保存最完整的洋楼建筑群，有2000余栋欧式建筑，被称为万国建筑博览会。
attractions.tips: 骑马车或租自行车游览最佳。

attractions.name: 瓷房子
attractions.description: 用4亿多片古瓷片装饰的法式建筑，被誉为全球最疯狂的建筑之一。
attractions.address: 天津市和平区赤峰道72号
attractions.tips: 拍照很出片，内部收藏丰富。

attractions.name: 天津博物馆
attractions.description: 综合性博物馆，馆藏20万件文物，以甲骨文和瓷器收藏著称。
attractions.address: 天津市河西区平江道62号
attractions.tips: 周一闭馆。

attractions.name: 天津海昌极地海洋世界
attractions.description: 华北地区最大的极地海洋馆，有白鲸、海豚、企鹅等极地动物。
attractions.address: 天津市滨海新区响螺湾商务区
attractions.tips: 周末人多，建议工作日去。

attractions.name: 南市食品街
attractions.description: 天津最大的美食集中地，汇集了狗不理包子、耳朵眼炸糕等天津名小吃。
attractions.tips: 早上去吃煎饼果子最正宗。

attractions.name: 天津广播电视塔
attractions.description: 高415.2米，是天津的地标建筑之一，塔上有旋转餐厅和观光层。
attractions.address: 天津市河西区卫津南路1号
attractions.tips: 天气好时视野可达70公里。

attractions.name: 大悲禅院
attractions.description: 天津最大的佛教寺院，始建于清初，寺内有释迦牟尼佛真身舍利。
attractions.address: 天津市河北区天纬路40号
attractions.tips: 农历初一十五有法会。

attractions.name: 滨江道
attractions.description: 天津最繁华的商业街，全长2094米，汇集各大商场和品牌。
attractions.tips: 与和平路步行街相连。

attractions.name: 天津动物园
attractions.description: 华北地区最大的动物园之一，有300多种动物，大熊猫馆最受欢迎。
attractions.address: 天津市南开区水上公园东路
attractions.tips: 与水上公园相邻。

attractions.name: 水上公园
attractions.description: 天津最大的公园，面积164公顷，以湖泊和园林著称。
attractions.address: 天津市南开区水上公园路
attractions.tips: 夏季荷花盛开最美。

attractions.name: 杨柳青古镇
attractions.description: 中国年画之乡，杨柳青年画是中国四大木版年画之一。
attractions.address: 天津市西青区杨柳青镇
attractions.tips: 春节前最热闹。

attractions.name: 石家大院
attractions.description: 清末民初建筑，华北第一宅，有156间房屋，展示了天津商贾文化。
attractions.address: 天津市西青区杨柳青镇
attractions.tips: 与杨柳青古镇一起游览。

attractions.name: 天津森林动物园
attractions.description: 位于滨海新区，以散养方式展示动物，占地5000亩。
attractions.tips: 自驾游览最方便。

attractions.name: 天津大剧院
attractions.description: 天津文化中心核心建筑，设计灵感来自湖中之石，是天津文化新地标。
attractions.tips: 可看演出，建筑本身也值得参观。

attractions.name: 盘山风景区
attractions.description: 天津后花园，有京东第一山之称，集自然风光和佛教文化于一体。
attractions.tips: 秋季红叶最美。

attractions.name: 天津自行车博物馆
attractions.description: 中国唯一的自行车专题博物馆，展示了自行车200年发展历史。
attractions.tips: 飞鸽自行车是天津骄傲。

attractions.name: 金汤桥
attractions.description: 天津解放会师地，始建于1906年，是天津现存最早的开启式铁桥。
attractions.tips: 与海河游船结合游览。

attractions.name: 望海楼教堂
attractions.description: 中国近代史上著名的教堂，1869年建成，哥特式建筑风格。
attractions.address: 天津市河北区狮子林大街292号
attractions.tips: 天津教案发生地。

attractions.name: 天津科技馆
attractions.description: 华北地区最大的科技馆，有400多件互动展品。
attractions.address: 天津市河西区隆昌路94号
attractions.tips: 带孩子的好去处。

attractions.name: 南开大学
attractions.description: 中国著名高等学府，周恩来总理母校，校园环境优美。
attractions.address: 天津市南开区卫津路94号
attractions.tips: 可参观主楼和总理纪念馆。

attractions.name: 天津大学
attractions.description: 中国第一所现代大学，始建于1895年，前身为北洋大学。
attractions.address: 天津市南开区卫津路92号
attractions.tips: 与南开大学相邻。

attractions.name: 大沽口炮台
attractions.description: 中国近代史上重要的海防要塞，见证了鸦片战争和八国联军侵华。
attractions.address: 天津市滨海新区大沽口
attractions.tips: 爱国主义教育基地。

attractions.name: 滨海图书馆
attractions.description: 由MVRDV设计，内部有34层白色阶梯式书架，被称为最美图书馆。
attractions.address: 天津市滨海新区中心图书馆
attractions.tips: 拍照很出片。

attractions.name: 天津七里海湿地
attractions.description: 中国最大的古海岸与湿地国家级自然保护区，面积95平方公里。
attractions.tips: 秋季观鸟最佳。

attractions.name: 名流茶馆
attractions.description: 天津最有名的相声茶馆，可体验天津传统曲艺文化。
attractions.address: 天津市和平区新华路177号
attractions.tips: 提前预约，晚场最精彩。

restaurants.name: 狗不理包子
restaurants.address: Multiple locations including Shandong Road
restaurants.description: Legendary baozi restaurant famous since 1858. Known for thin-skinned, juicy dumplings.

restaurants.name: 耳朵眼炸糕
restaurants.address: 2 Nanshi Gate, Hebei District
restaurants.description: Famous for crispy red bean fried cakes, a Tianjin specialty since 1905.

restaurants.name: 十八街麻花
restaurants.address: Multiple locations
restaurants.description: Iconic Tianjin braid-like fried dough snack, crispy and not greasy.

restaurants.name: 津菜典藏
restaurants.address: 68 Nanjing Road, Heping District
restaurants.description: High-end restaurant serving refined Tianjin cuisine with elegant atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 红旗饭庄
restaurants.address: 158 Weining Road, Hexi District
restaurants.description: Historic Tianjin restaurant known for traditional local dishes.

restaurants.name: 盛锡福
restaurants.address: Nanshi Gate, Hebei District
restaurants.description: Traditional restaurant with famous hat-shaped pastries.

restaurants.name: 石头门坎
restaurants.address: Near Tianhou Temple, Ancient Culture Street
restaurants.description: Famous vegetarian restaurant near the temple, known for meat-substitute dishes.

restaurants.name: 天津烤鸭店
restaurants.address: 89 Nanjing Road, Heping District
restaurants.description: Quality Peking duck restaurant with crispy skin and traditional service.

restaurants.name: 起士林
restaurants.address: 33 Yunnan Road, Heping District
restaurants.description: Historic restaurant with Russian influence, serving fusion cuisine.

restaurants.name: 崩豆张
restaurants.address: Nanshi Gate area
restaurants.description: Famous for crispy soybeans and nuts, a traditional Tianjin snack.

restaurants.name: 老北京涮羊肉
restaurants.address: 68 Changde Road, Heping District
restaurants.description: Popular lamb hotpot with traditional Mongolian style.

restaurants.name: 宴宾楼
restaurants.address: 69 Guiyang Road, Hexi District
restaurants.description: Upscale Tianjin restaurant with imperial-style dishes.

restaurants.name: 街边小吃
restaurants.address: Ancient Culture Street
restaurants.description: Various street food stalls along the tourist street.

restaurants.name: 天津海鲜坊
restaurants.address: Binhai New Area
restaurants.description: Fresh seafood restaurant near the port area.

restaurants.name: 百饺圆
restaurants.address: Multiple locations
restaurants.description: Popular for variety of delicious dumplings with unique fillings.

restaurants.name: 砂锅李
restaurants.address: Nanshi Gate area
restaurants.description: Famous for sandpot cooking and rich broth dishes.

restaurants.name: 桂园餐厅
restaurants.address: 42 Guangchuan Road, Heping District
restaurants.description: Local favorite known for home-style Tianjin dishes.

restaurants.name: 南市食品街
restaurants.address: Nanshi Gate, Hebei District
restaurants.description: Historic food street with multiple restaurants and snack shops.

restaurants.name: 老天津卫
restaurants.address: Near Ancient Culture Street
restaurants.description: Restaurant serving traditional Tianjin cuisine with vintage decor.

restaurants.name: 利顺德大饭店
restaurants.address: 33 Tangji Road, Heping District
restaurants.description: Historic luxury hotel restaurant with colonial atmosphere and quality food.

restaurants.name: 海底捞火锅
restaurants.address: Joy City Mall, 166 Nanjing Road
restaurants.description: Famous chain hotpot with excellent service and entertainment.

restaurants.name: 潮汕砂锅粥
restaurants.address: Weining Road, Hexi District
restaurants.description: Popular for seafood congee and late-night dining.

restaurants.name: 粥世家
restaurants.address: Multiple locations
restaurants.description: Morning congee shop popular with locals for breakfast.

restaurants.name: 鲜又多
restaurants.address: Hebei District
restaurants.description: Local hotpot chain with fresh ingredients and reasonable prices.

restaurants.name: 北塘海鲜
restaurants.address: Beitang, Binhai New Area
restaurants.description: Famous for fresh catches from Beitang fishing village.

restaurants.name: 老天津麻花
restaurants.address: 天津市市中心区美食街194号
restaurants.description: 天津本地人推荐的麻花店，味道正宗，价格实惠

restaurants.name: 传统麻花
restaurants.address: 天津市老城区美食街138号
restaurants.description: 天津本地人推荐的麻花店，味道正宗，价格实惠

restaurants.description: 天津本地人推荐的麻花店，味道正宗，价格实惠

arrival.to: Tianjin Railway Station / Tianjin West Station
arrival.tips: Beijing-Tianjin high-speed is very convenient (30 min). Both stations have metro connections.

culturalTips.title: Tianjin Snacks
culturalTips.content: Tianjin is famous for 'three treasures': Goubuli baozi, Erduoyan fried cake, and Shibajie mahua. These are must-try snacks available throughout the city.

culturalTips.title: Colonial Heritage
culturalTips.content: Tianjin has nine foreign concession areas with European architecture. The Five Great Avenues area showcases Italian, French, British and other colonial buildings from the early 1900s.

culturalTips.title: Traditional Crafts
culturalTips.content: Tianjin is known for Yangliuqing New Year paintings, clay figurines, and kites. Visit the crafts shops in Ancient Culture Street for authentic souvenirs.

culturalTips.title: Tianjin Dialect
culturalTips.content: Tianjin dialect is known for its humor and directness. Locals are proud of their unique accent which differs significantly from Beijing dialect.

culturalTips.title: Tianjin Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Tianjin cuisine is known for its seafood, especially clams and river fish. The city also has famous braised dishes and rich broth soups.

culturalTips.title: European Architecture
culturalTips.content: Walking through Five Great Avenues feels like being in Europe. The area has over 200 colonial buildings from 10 countries, now mostly housing cafes and boutiques.

culturalTips.title: Haihe River Culture
culturalTips.content: The Haihe River is central to Tianjin's identity, with historic bridges and riverside walks. Evening cruises offer beautiful views of the city skyline.

culturalTips.title: Tianjin Opera
culturalTips.content: Tianjin is known for its traditional Peking opera performances. The Tianjin Drama票价 is worth visiting for authentic shows.

culturalTips.title: Mahua Culture
culturalTips.content: Tianjin mahua (fried dough twists) is a famous snack with crispy texture. It's often bought as a souvenir to take home.

culturalTips.title: Revolutionary History
culturalTips.content: Tianjin played a role in modern Chinese history, with various revolutionary activities. The Memorial Hall offers insights into this period.

culturalTips.title: Proximity to Beijing
culturalTips.content: Tianjin is only 30 minutes from Beijing by high-speed train, making it an easy day trip or weekend destination from the capital.

culturalTips.title: Port City Heritage
culturalTips.content: As a major port, Tianjin has international influences in its food and culture. The port area offers views of modern shipping operations.

culturalTips.title: Folk Performances
culturalTips.content: Traditional folk performances including acrobatics and Chinese opera can be seen at various venues. Tianjin is famous for its folk arts.

culturalTips.title: Traditional Shopping
culturalTips.content: Nanshi Gate and Ancient Culture Street offer traditional Chinese goods, crafts, and local snacks. Bargaining is expected at markets.

culturalTips.title: Getting Around
culturalTips.content: Tianjin has a modern metro system connecting major attractions. The city is walkable in central areas with Haihe River providing a scenic walking route.

culturalTips.title: Bai jiao Yuan
culturalTips.content: Tianjin is famous for dumplings - over 100 varieties. The city takes dumpling making to an art form with unique shapes and fillings.
